_comment: Species: Spirit Snake (灵蛇) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Snake

canonical.appearance: Serpentine body 5 m, scales spirit-green, venom drips spirit-corroding acid
canonical.size: 5 m adult, 200 jin; ancient 20 m, 5000 jin
canonical.behavior: Ambush predator; cultivates by absorbing venom-essence; constricts prey
canonical.diet: spirit rabbits, spirit deer, smaller beasts
canonical.relationships: Rival of spirit foxes; preyed upon by giant pythons
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_snake — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
